n: Instance: The Watcher in the Water

steps.t: Bósi is on the slope that leads up to the pool before the Doors of Durin. Bósi is waiting to wish you well against the Watcher in the Water. He is con…
Bósi sent some dwarves up to the pool to scout ahead for the beast. Armed with your new weapon, you are ready to face the Watcher in the Water.
Brogur has come to the shore of the Black Pool, against his cousin's wishes.
Bósi and Brogur are on the edge of the pool. The Watcher in the Water has been driven off, and you should now speak with Bósi and Brogur.
